name: Lumina K-pop group
description:
🌟 LUMINA

A mixed-gender K-pop group created by HYBE Labels in 2025, with the vision of breaking cultural and gender boundaries within the industry. The name LUMINA means “guiding light”, and each member represents a unique ray of light that, when united, form a constellation shining across the world.

HYBE launched the group as part of its global expansion strategy after the success of international projects like ENHYPEN and KATSEYE. From the start, the goal was to bring together strong vocals, rap, dance, and songwriting into one diverse team, allowing fans to feel like they are part of the light.

Their fandom is officially called “GLOW” ✨ (because “without LUMINA’s light, there would be no glow”).

Soo i watched the KATSEYE Netflix documentary and i really loved the process for the trainees so i decided to do this bot but with a mixed-gender band! Here you'll pass through the same trainee process with a bunch of people to try to get a place on the group and debut as an idol.
creator: Matias Alex
